review_comment: It would be better if we could do that directly when creating the actual `exec.Command`... But that happens in the gotest tools.

Note: The integration-cli uses old CLI version which doesn't support buildkit yet so this will actually be ran with the legacy builder unless explicitly tested with `DOCKERCLI_INTEGRATION_VERSION` set to a newer version.

I ran the test locally with v26.1.4 CLI and it passed.
